curation.synopsis: The agri-world of Virger-Mos II is one of the quietest places in the Imperium — until the day the long-range vox carries the news that Terra has fallen, the Emperor is dead, and Horus Lupercal sits upon the throne. In Town Forty-Four, mechanic Silas Cincade volunteers to ride to the capital and learn the truth. His neighbour Leon Kyyter listens to the stranger from Terra, a remembrancer with an odd tattoo, and begins to doubt the story even as the townsfolk arm themselves and turn their suspicion on each other. By the time the lights in the sky appear and the first towns are reported burning, Leon understands what the stranger really is: an Alpha Legion operative named Mendacs, sent to break a world with rumour alone. Mendacs leaves for his next mission, and Leon watches in silence as his planet tears itself apart.
